verses.en: When the victory of Allāh has come and the conquest,
verses.id: Apabila telah datang pertolongan Allah dan kemenangan,

verses.arabic: وَرَأَيْتَ ٱلنَّاسَ يَدْخُلُونَ فِى دِينِ ٱللَّهِ أَفْوَاجًا
verses.en: And you see the people entering into the religion of Allāh in multitudes,
verses.id: dan engkau melihat manusia berbondong-bondong masuk agama Allah.

verses.arabic: فَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ وَٱسْتَغْفِرْهُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ تَوَّابًۢا
verses.en: Then exalt [Him] with praise of your Lord and ask forgiveness of Him. Indeed, He is ever Accepting of Repentance.
verses.id: maka bertasbihlah dengan memuji Tuhanmu dan mohonlah ampunan kepada-Nya. Sungguh, Dia Maha Penerima tobat.
